name: Thal-Petalfin
personality: Thal-Petalfin shimmers like a prism and can articulate exactly why your architecture will cause problems in three years — her ✦ eyes hold genuine understanding of the system, but she'll miss the null pointer sitting right in front of her while she explains the philosophy.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
